title: Kikuo 14CM Wooden Learning Clock, Colorful Teaching Clock with Hour and Minute Hands Education Toy, Learn to Tell the Time Clock for Home, Playroom, and Classroom (Blue)
features: Perfect Size: Measuring about 14 x 14 x 0.4 cm/ 5.51 x 5.51 x 0.16 inches and weighing about 50 g, our wooden teaching clocks is the perfect size for children's learning time needs. You can also share it with your friends who own kids at home.

Make Learning Time Fun: Our wooden telling the time clock is designed to help children establish a sense of time and self-discipline, while also inspiring their learning interests with its bright colors, establish good thinking patterns and behavior habits.

Sturdy and Safe: Made of high-quality wood material, our toy clock for learning is safe, reliable, and sturdy, with polished surfaces without burrs, which can provide you or kids comfy hand tactility, serviceable for a long time.

Easy to Use: With an hour hand and a minute hand, our childrens clock g is simple and convenient to use, and doesn't require any batteries. You can move the hands by hand to teach your child how to tell time.

Nice Gifts: Our kids clock learn to tell the time is not only a great gift for kids, but also a useful teaching tool in the classroom. It can be used to teach colors, establish good thinking patterns and behavior habits, and make learning time no longer boring.
description: Why did we make this product? We know that learning to tell time should be fun, easy and part of everyday life, so we designed this clock to help our children and yours master this important life skill. Features Child friendly material, childrens wall clock is sturdy and durable, with different colours, not easy to break or fade, smooth surface and edges, not easy to scratch hands, can be used for a long time. Product Specification Material: Wooden Colour: As shown in the picture Size: Approx. 14 x 14 x 0.4 cm/ 5.51 x 5.51 x 0.16 inches Package Includes 1 x Time Learning Clock Note Manual measurement, slight error in size. Colours may vary slightly due to different screen displays.
